member.name: T:ProjectExpenseTracker.Models.Expense
member.summary: Expense fetched from a project's sub-collection in Firestore.

member.name: T:ProjectExpenseTracker.Models.Project
member.summary: Project fetched from Firebase Firestore. Computed properties (TotalSpent, Remaining, UsagePercent) are derived from the Expenses list which is loaded separately on the detail screen.

member.name: T:ProjectExpenseTracker.Services.FavouritesService
member.summary:
Persists favourite project IDs locally using MAUI Preferences. Feature (h) — favourite projects.
Storage key: "fav_ids" Format: comma-separated Firestore document IDs

member.name: M:ProjectExpenseTracker.Services.FavouritesService.IsFavourite(System.String)
member.summary: Returns true if the project is marked as a favourite.

member.name: M:ProjectExpenseTracker.Services.FavouritesService.Toggle(System.String)
member.summary: Adds to favourites if not present; removes if present.

member.name: M:ProjectExpenseTracker.Services.FavouritesService.GetAll
member.summary: Returns a snapshot of all favourite IDs.

member.name: T:ProjectExpenseTracker.ViewModels.Base.BaseViewModel
member.summary: Base class for all ViewModels. Provides INotifyPropertyChanged and common state properties (IsLoading, IsEmpty).

member.name: T:ProjectExpenseTracker.ViewModels.FavouritesViewModel
member.summary: ViewModel for FavouritesView. Loads only the projects the user has starred. Feature (h) — favourite projects.

member.name: T:ProjectExpenseTracker.ViewModels.ProjectDetailViewModel
member.summary: ViewModel for ProjectDetailView. Loads expenses for the selected project and manages the favourite toggle.

member.name: T:ProjectExpenseTracker.ViewModels.ProjectsViewModel
member.summary: ViewModel for ProjectsView. Fetches all projects from Firebase and handles search + status filtering.

member.name: T:ProjectExpenseTracker.Resource
member.summary: Android Resource Designer class. Exposes the Android Resource designer assembly into the project Namespace.
